## 📋 Today's Overview
*May 25, 2026*

### Superconductivity (7 new today)

1.  The study focuses on **kagome metals**, employing **an analysis of soft loop-current fluctuations** to address/solve **the mechanism for unconventional superconductivity and multiple superconducting phases under pressure**.
2.  The study focuses on **superconducting cuprate tapes**, employing **discussions from the Magnet Technology Conference (MT29)** to address/solve **the need for standardized characterization and parametrization of critical currents**.
3.  The study focuses on **a hybrid transition metal dichalcogenide**, employing **scanning tunneling microscopy** to address/solve **the role of moiré potentials and incommensurability in driving electronic correlations and superconductivity in bulk materials**.
4.  The study focuses on **underdoped YBa₂Cu₃O₆₊ₓ (YBCO)**, employing **intense terahertz pulse experiments** to address/solve **the existence of local superconducting fluctuations up to the pseudogap temperature T***.
5.  The study focuses on **doped spin multimer systems**, employing **a mapping onto the universal hardcore boson model** to address/solve **the emergence of superconductivity from complex spin couplings in the strong-binding-energy limit**.
6.  The study focuses on **two-dimensional chiral superconductors**, employing **the anomalous acoustoelectric effect** to address/solve **the challenge of detecting chiral p-wave pairing for topological quantum computing**.
7.  The study focuses on **superconducting niobium films**, employing **systematic examination of moat arrays** to address/solve **the mitigation of magnetic flux trapping for very large scale integration in superconducting electronics**.

### spin glass (1 new today)

1. The study focuses on the parallel minority game, employing a mapping to an Ising spin glass in the mean-field limit to solve the problem of minimizing population variance across multiple choices.

| 1 | **[Superconductivity in kagome metals due to soft loop-current fluctuations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.16892v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We demonstrate that soft fluctuations of translation symmetry-breaking loop currents provide a mechanism for unconventional superconductivity in kagome metals that naturally addresses the multiple superconducting phases observed under pressure. Focusing on the rich multi-orbital character of these systems, we show that loop currents involving both vanadium and antimony orbitals generate low-energy collective modes that couple efficiently to electrons near the Fermi surface and mediate attractive interactions in two distinct unconventional pairing channels. While loop-current fluctuations confined to vanadium orbitals favor chiral $d+id$ superconductivity, which spontaneously breaks time-reversal symmetry, the inclusion of antimony orbitals stabilizes an $s^{\pm}$ state that is robust against disorder. We argue that these two states are realized experimentally as pressure increases and the antimony-dominated Fermi surface sheet undergoes a Lifshitz transition.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们证明，平移对称性破缺的环电流的软涨落为笼目金属中的非常规超导提供了一种机制，该机制自然地解释了在压力下观察到的多个超导相。聚焦于这些系统丰富的多轨道特性，我们表明，涉及钒和锑两种轨道的环电流会产生低能集体模式，这些模式与费米面附近的电子高效耦合，并在两个不同的非常规配对通道中中介吸引相互作用。虽然局限于钒轨道的环电流涨落有利于手性 $d+id$ 超导（该超导自发破缺时间反演对称性），但包含锑轨道则稳定了一种对无序具有鲁棒性的 $s^{\pm}$ 态。我们认为，随着压力增加以及锑主导的费米面片经历 Lifshitz 相变，这两种态在实验上得以实现。</p></details> | 2026-05-21 | Daniel J. Schultz et al. |
| 2 | **[Understanding critical currents in superconducting cuprate tapes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.09640v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>One of the key challenges in the fabrication of superconducting coils using cuprate tapes is the parametrization of the critical currents and their dependence on magnetic field, temperature, and angle. Discussions at the Magnet Technology Conference (MT29) in Boston (2025) highlighted the need for standardized characterization and a better understanding of these tapes. Without a shared understanding of the physical phenomena governing critical currents, progress in this area remains difficult. We propose to analyze existing data using a model that explains most observed features. Although the model proposed by P. Mathieu and Y. Simon was published 20 years ago, it remains relatively unknown and certainly unused among engineers in the field, although many physicists were convinced of its validity, a consensus not reflected in the literature. The Mathieu/Simon (MS) model emphasizes the importance of surface pinning mechanisms, which dominate critical currents across a large part of the phase diagram of YBaCuO. Unlike strong and weak pinning mechanisms, which are commonly assumed to be dominant, the MS model accurately predicts the order of magnitude of experimentally measured values, suggesting it should at least be considered the dominant mechanism. The results of calculations based on this model are presented and compared with experimental data, offering directions for the development of new materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>使用铜酸盐带材制造超导线圈的关键挑战之一，是临界电流及其对磁场、温度和角度依赖关系的参数化。2025 年在波士顿举行的磁体技术会议 (MT29) 上的讨论强调了标准化表征和更好理解这些带材的必要性。如果对支配临界电流的物理现象缺乏共识，该领域的进展将仍然困难。我们提议使用一个能解释大多数观测特征的模型来分析现有数据。尽管 P. Mathieu 和 Y. Simon 提出的模型发表于 20 年前，但它在工程领域仍然相对不为人知且肯定未被使用，尽管许多物理学家确信其有效性，但这种共识并未反映在文献中。Mathieu/Simon (MS) 模型强调了表面钉扎机制的重要性，该机制在 YBaCuO 相图的大部分区域主导临界电流。与通常被假定为主导的强钉扎和弱钉扎机制不同，MS 模型准确预测了实验测量值的量级，表明它至少应被视为主导机制。本文展示了基于该模型的计算结果，并与实验数据进行了比较，为新材料的发展提供了方向。</p></details> | 2026-05-21 | Charles Simon et al. |
| 3 | **[Competing incommensurability, electronic correlations, and superconductivity in a hybrid transition metal dichalcogenide](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22522v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The engineering of superlattices in two-dimensional van der Waals materials has enabled the realization of rich phase diagrams hosting topological and strongly correlated phases. While incommensurability is widespread in three-dimensional systems, the role of moiré potentials in bulk materials remains largely unexplored. Here, using scanning tunneling microscopy, we demonstrate that a bulk transition-metal dichalcogenide polytype, 4Hb-TaS$_2$, hosts an emergent incommensurate potential between its alternating 1T and 1H layers. Interplay with a concomitant incommensurate charge-density wave suppresses the long-range order of this potential, leading to intricate coupling with electronic correlations in the doped 1T surface layer. Combining density functional theory with dynamical mean-field theory, we show that the lattice mismatch locally modulates the interlayer distance, thereby tuning both hybridization and charge transfer between the correlated 1T and metallic 1H layers. This redistribution of charge drives the system towards a doped Mott regime, in which the remaining local moments become self-screened, giving rise to a zero-bias resonance. We further find that bulk superconductivity competes with both the underlying landscape and the associated charge transfer. Our results establish incommensurate potentials as a previously overlooked ingredient in hybrid transition-metal dichalcogenides, highlighting their central role in the interplay between electronic correlations, charge-density-wave order, and unconventional superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>二维范德华材料中超晶格的工程化实现了包含拓扑和强关联相位的丰富相图。虽然非公度性在三维系统中普遍存在，但莫尔势在体材料中的作用在很大程度上仍未得到探索。在此，我们利用扫描隧道显微镜证明，一种块体过渡金属硫族化物多型体 4Hb-TaS$_2$ 在其交替的 1T 和 1H 层之间承载了一种涌现的非公度势。与伴随的非公度电荷密度波的相互作用抑制了该势的长程有序，导致其与掺杂的 1T 表面层中的电子关联产生复杂耦合。结合密度泛函理论与动力学平均场理论，我们表明晶格失配局部调制了层间距，从而调控了关联的 1T 层与金属性的 1H 层之间的杂化和电荷转移。这种电荷的重新分布驱动系统进入掺杂的莫特 regime，其中剩余的局域磁矩变得自屏蔽，从而产生零偏压共振。我们进一步发现，体超导性与底层势景观和相关的电荷转移相互竞争。我们的结果确立了非公度势是混合过渡金属硫族化物中一个先前被忽视的因素，突出了其在电子关联、电荷密度波序和非常规超导相互作用中的核心作用。</p></details> | 2026-05-21 | Jean C. Souza et al. |
| 4 | **[Parametrically amplified Josephson plasma waves in YBa_2Cu_3O_(6+x): evidence for local superconducting fluctuations up to the pseudogap temperature $T^*$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.03358v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Experiments that subject underdoped $\rm{YBa_2Cu_3O_{6+x}}$ (YBCO) to intense terahertz pulses at temperatures between the transition temperature $T_c$ and the pseudogap scale $T^*$ have revealed a reflectivity edge that resembles that of the superconducting state, together with second harmonic generation of a probe pulse modulated at a similar frequency. These have been interpreted in terms of parametric amplification of the lower Josephson plasmon mode. Since this mode is often associated with coherent oscillations between bilayers in the YBCO structure, these experiments have led to the suggestion that the intense pump has created (or revealed) in-plane pair coherence up to $T^* \approx 400K$. In this paper we propose an alternative explanation by assuming the existence of local pair amplitude and phase at equilibrium for $T_c < T < T^*$. The phase correlation spans only a few lattice constants and we do not assume any pump-induced enhancement of this correlation, either in-plane or between bilayers. Instead, the coherent drive, via a parametric amplification process, induces coherence in the Josephson currents between members of bilayers. When combined with a Floquet framework, the reflectivity data can be explained. The key point is that in the lower Josephson plasmon, the coupling between bilayers is mainly capacitive; the Josephson current between bilayers can be set to zero without strongly affecting the parametric amplification process. Importantly, while superconducting coherence may not be created by the pump, the pseudogap phase must possess a local pairing amplitude at equilibrium. Consequently, these experiments have strong implications for the understanding of the pseudogap phase.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在转变温度 $T_c$ 和赝能隙标度 $T^*$ 之间的温度下，对欠掺杂 $\rm{YBa_2Cu_3O_{6+x}}$ (YBCO) 施加强太赫兹脉冲的实验揭示了一个类似于超导态的反射率边，同时伴随有以相似频率调制的探测脉冲的二次谐波产生。这些现象被解释为下约瑟夫森等离激元模式的参量放大。由于该模式通常与 YBCO 结构中双层之间的相干振荡相关，这些实验导致了一种观点，即强泵浦在高达 $T^* \approx 400K$ 的温度下创造（或揭示）了面内配对相干性。在本文中，我们通过假设在 $T_c < T < T^*$ 的平衡态下存在局域配对振幅和相位，提出了一种替代解释。相位关联仅跨越几个晶格常数，我们并不假设泵浦诱导了这种关联（无论是面内还是双层之间）的增强。相反，相干驱动通过参量放大过程诱导了双层成员之间的约瑟夫森电流的相干性。当结合 Floquet 框架时，反射率数据可以得到解释。关键在于，在下约瑟夫森等离激元中，双层之间的耦合主要是电容性的；可以在不强烈影响参量放大过程的情况下将双层之间的约瑟夫森电流设为零。重要的是，虽然超导相干性可能并非由泵浦产生，但赝能隙相在平衡态下必须具有局域配对振幅。因此，这些实验对理解赝能隙相具有重要启示。</p></details> | 2026-05-21 | Marios H. Michael et al. |
| 5 | **[Superconductivity in doped spin multimer systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22128v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Binding energy, which quantifies pair formation, is a key factor in the emergence of superconductivity. Here, we show that even when multiple spins are complexly coupled, hole-doped systems, which can be mapped onto the universal hardcore boson model in the strong-binding-energy limit, exhibit promising signatures of superconductivity. We analytically and numerically demonstrate this concept in the double Kondo lattice model. Using the density-matrix renormalization group method, we show that a pairing state is maintained via a crossover even for parameters away from the strong-coupling regime. Additionally, we find that once binding energies are sufficiently generated, pair correlations develop similarly regardless of the details of local spin correlations. Our findings suggest useful guidelines for research on superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>结合能，作为量化配对形成的量，是超导出现的关键因素。在此，我们表明，即使在多个自旋复杂耦合的情况下，空穴掺杂系统（在强结合能极限下可映射到通用硬核玻色子模型）也展现出有希望的超导迹象。我们在双近藤晶格模型中解析和数值地论证了这一概念。利用密度矩阵重正化群方法，我们展示了一个配对态即使在远离强耦合区域的参数下也能通过交叉得以维持。此外，我们发现一旦结合能充分产生，无论局域自旋关联的细节如何，配对关联都会以相似的方式发展。我们的发现为超导研究提供了有用的指导方针。</p></details> | 2026-05-21 | Ritsuki Hirabayashi et al. |
| 6 | **[Anomalous acoustoelectric signatures of chiral superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21936v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The identification of unconventional pairing in two-dimensional materials is a central challenge in modern condensed matter physics. While chiral p-wave superconductivity offers a promising platform for topological quantum computing, its detection remains elusive due to the inherent limitations of optical probes in the two-dimensional limit. We propose the anomalous acoustoelectric effect as a robust, alternative to optical signature of p-wave paring symmetry. We demonstrate that an acoustic wave induces a transverse dc current resulting in a measurable condensate phase difference on sample boundaries originating from the anisotropic scattering of quasiparticles in the absence of an external magnetic field. Crucially, the quasiparticle-mediated acoustoelectric response dominates near the critical temperature and, unlike the superconducting condensate, is not suppressed by electron-hole asymmetry factor. These results establish the anomalous acoustoelectric effect as a high-sensitivity electrical probe of the chiral order parameter, providing a tool for experimental detecting of unconventional pairing in superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>二维材料中非常规配对态的识别是当代凝聚态物理的核心挑战。虽然手性p波超导为拓扑量子计算提供了有前景的平台，但由于光学探针在二维极限下的固有局限性，其探测仍难以实现。我们提出反常声电效应作为p波配对对称性的稳健光学替代探测方案。研究表明，声波可诱导横向直流电流，在无外加磁场条件下，由准粒子各向异性散射引起样品边界上可测量的凝聚相位差。关键在于，准粒子介导的声电响应在临界温度附近占主导地位，且与超导凝聚体不同，不受电子-空穴不对称因子的抑制。这些结果确立了反常声电效应作为手性序参量的高灵敏度电学探针，为实验探测超导体中的非常规配对提供了工具。</p></details> | 2026-05-21 | A. N. Osipov et al. |
| 7 | **[Mitigation of Magnetic Flux Trapping in Superconducting Electronics Using Moats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.18345v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Magnetic flux (vortex) trapping remains a major obstacle to very large scale integration in superconducting electronics. Moats -- etched regions in circuit layers placed in ground planes and around critical circuitry -- offer a simple passive approach to sequester flux. Here, we systematically examine the effectiveness of moat arrays in superconducting niobium films as a function of geometry (size, shape, and density) and background magnetic field. By measuring the vortex expulsion field, we estimate the flux saturation number and flux trapping temperature for a range of geometries. We find that many moat designs effectively sequester flux in magnetically shielded environments (< 1 $μ$T), with high-aspect-ratio rectangular "slit" moats providing the strongest mitigation at minimal area cost. However, our measurements show that moats alone do not eliminate flux trapping in non-ideal films, as vortices can preferentially pin at material defects. These results provide design guidance for flux mitigation in superconducting integrated circuits and highlight the need for combined optimization of circuit geometries and materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>磁通（涡旋）捕获仍是超导电子学实现超大规模集成的主要障碍。沟槽——在电路层地平面及关键电路周围刻蚀的区域——提供了一种简单的被动式磁通隔离方法。本文系统研究了超导铌薄膜中沟槽阵列的效能随几何结构（尺寸、形状与密度）及背景磁场的变化规律。通过测量涡旋排出场，我们估算了不同几何构型下的磁通饱和数与磁通捕获温度。研究发现，在磁屏蔽环境（<1 μT）中，多数沟槽设计能有效隔离磁通，其中高宽比矩形"狭缝"沟槽以最小面积代价实现最强抑制效果。然而测量表明，在非理想薄膜中仅凭沟槽无法消除磁通捕获——涡旋会优先钉扎于材料缺陷处。这些结果为超导集成电路的磁通抑制提供了设计指导，并凸显了电路几何结构与材料协同优化的必要性。</p></details> | 2026-05-20 | Rohan T. Kapur et al. |
| 8 | **[Signatures of unconventional superconductivity near reentrant and fractional quantum anomalous Hall insulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.06972v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Two-dimensional moiré Chern bands provide an exceptional platform for exploring a variety of many-body quantum phases at zero magnetic field within a lattice system. One particular intriguing possibility is that flat Chern bands can, in principle, support exotic superconducting phases together with fractional topological phases. Here, we report the observation of integer and fractional quantum anomalous Hall effects, the reentrant quantum anomalous Hall effect, and superconductivity within the first moiré Chern band of twisted bilayer MoTe2. The superconducting phase emerges from a normal state exhibiting anomalous Hall effects. Our results present the first example of superconductivity emerging within a flat Chern band that simultaneously hosts fractional quantum anomalous effects, a phenomenon never observed in any other systems. Our work expands the understanding of emergent quantum phenomena in moiré Chern bands, and offers a nearly ideal platform for engineering Majorana and parafermion zero modes in gate-controlled hybrid devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>二维莫尔陈数带为在晶格系统中零磁场下探索多种多体量子相提供了独特平台。一个特别引人入胜的可能性是，平坦陈数带原则上可以支持奇异超导相以及分数量子拓扑相。在此，我们报道了在扭曲双层MoTe₂的第一个莫尔陈数带中观测到整数和分数量子反常霍尔效应、可重入量子反常霍尔效应以及超导电性。超导相从呈现反常霍尔效应的正常态中涌现。我们的结果首次展示了在同时承载分数量子反常效应的平坦陈数带中出现超导电性，这一现象在其他任何系统中均未被观测到。本工作拓展了对莫尔陈数带中涌现量子现象的理解，并为在栅控混合器件中工程化马约拉纳和帕拉费米子零模提供了近乎理想的平台。</p></details> | 2026-05-20 | Fan Xu et al. |
| 9 | **[Multiple Superconducting Phases in Palladium Deuteride Induced by Nuclear-Spin Isotope Effect](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20966v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the superconducting properties of high-quality PdD$_{x}$ films. The resistivity shows a sharp drop at $T$ $\sim$1.7 K, marking the superconducting transition. However, a finite resistivity persists and vanishes at $\sim$0.6 K. The temperature and magnetic-field dependences of the resistivity exhibit multiple anomalies within the superconducting state, revealing distinct superconducting phases. Such anomalies are absent in PdH$_{x}$ films. These results demonstrate a clear qualitative difference between the superconducting phase diagrams of PdD$_{x}$ and PdH$_{x}$, highlighting the role of nuclear-spin isotope effects.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了高质量PdDₓ薄膜的超导特性。电阻率在约1.7 K处出现急剧下降，标志着超导转变的发生。然而，有限电阻率持续存在，直至约0.6 K处才完全消失。电阻率的温度和磁场依赖关系在超导态内展现出多重异常，揭示了不同的超导相。这些异常在PdHₓ薄膜中并不存在。这些结果清晰证明了PdDₓ与PdHₓ超导相图之间存在定性差异，凸显了核自旋同位素效应所起的作用。</p></details> | 2026-05-20 | Ryoma Kato et al. |
| 10 | **[Enhanced $s^\pm$-wave superconductivity in electron-doped La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17520v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In cuprates, electron doping yields a much lower superconducting $T_c$ than hole doping. For recently discovered nickelate superconductors, the analogous doping strategies become more challenging. Consequently, while hole-doped Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelates have been extensively studied, electron-doped RP nickelates remain rarely explored both experimentally and theoretically. Here we fill this gap by systematically investigating the two-orbital bilayer model for three representative systems: bulk La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ at ambient pressure and 15\,GPa, and a heterostructure La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$:La$_3$Al$_2$O$_7$ that provides a feasible experimental route to electron doping. Using first-principle calculations and large-scale dynamical cluster quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we find that electron doping generically enhances $s^\pm$-wave pairing superconductivity (SC) in all three cases, with the heterostructure showing the highest $T_c$ in the underdoped regime. Furthermore, our results suggest an inter-orbital cooperative mechanism that the pairing on the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital, induced by that on the $d_{z^2}$ orbital, plays a vital role in the SC. This work provides the theoretical prediction of enhanced SC in electron-doped RP nickelates and calls for future experimental verification.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在铜氧化物中，电子掺杂产生的超导转变温度T_c远低于空穴掺杂。对于近期发现的镍基超导体，类似的掺杂策略更具挑战性。因此，尽管空穴掺杂的Ruddlesden-Popper（RP）镍酸盐已被广泛研究，但电子掺杂的RP镍酸盐在实验和理论上仍鲜有探索。在此，我们通过系统研究三个代表性体系的双轨道双层模型来填补这一空白：常压和15 GPa下的块体La₃Ni₂O₇，以及一种为电子掺杂提供可行实验路径的异质结构La₃Ni₂O₇:La₃Al₂O₇。利用第一性原理计算和大尺度动态团簇量子蒙特卡罗模拟，我们发现电子掺杂普遍增强了所有三种情况下的s±波配对超导电性（SC），其中异质结构在欠掺杂区域显示出最高的T_c。此外，我们的结果表明一种轨道间协作机制：由d_z²轨道上的配对诱导产生的d_x²-y²轨道上的配对，在超导中起着至关重要的作用。本工作为电子掺杂RP镍酸盐中增强的超导电性提供了理论预测，并期待未来实验验证。</p></details> | 2026-05-20 | Xun Liu et al. |
| 11 | **[Pressure-induced superconductivity in epitaxially-stabilized Pr$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20653v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The discovery of high critical-temperature $T_{\mathrm{c}}$ superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ under high pressure has led to a rapid expansion of the $T_{\mathrm{c}}$ range through lanthanide $Ln$ substitution, and to ambient-pressure superconductivity in strained thin films, yet the exploration of new bilayer nickelates remains strongly constrained by thermodynamic stability. Beyond the difficulty of synthesis of bulk single-crystals, here we report on the pressure-induced high-$T_{\mathrm{c}}$ superconductivity in epitaxially-stabilized Pr$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ thin films. While the Pr$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ films exhibit insulating behaviour at ambient pressure regardless of ozone-annealing treatment, they show $T$-linear metallic transport and superconductivity reaching an onset $T_{\mathrm{c}}$ of 66 K and zero-resistance at nearly 40 K at 22 GPa. Furthermore, Nd$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, with the smaller rare-earth ion Nd, can also be stabilized, however, superconductivity is not observed in the measured pressure range. Epitaxial stabilization enables us to examine the dependence of $T_{\mathrm{c}}$ and the critical pressure $P_{\mathrm{c}}$ for superconductivity on the $Ln$ ion in $Ln_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ ($Ln$ = La, Pr, Nd). These results suggest that a higher $P_{\mathrm{c}}$ is required for smaller $Ln$ ions, consistent with trends observed in bulk studies of $Ln$ substitution. This study demonstrates that epitaxial stabilization is a powerful technique to further expand the family of superconducting bilayer nickelates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>高压下La₃Ni₂O₇中高临界温度T_c超导电性的发现，通过镧系元素Ln替代迅速扩展了T_c范围，并在应变薄膜中实现了常压超导电性，然而新型双层镍酸盐的探索仍受到热力学稳定性的强烈制约。除了块体单晶合成的困难之外，我们在此报道了在外延稳定化的Pr₃Ni₂O₇薄膜中压力诱导的高T_c超导电性。尽管Pr₃Ni₂O₇薄膜在常压下无论是否经过臭氧退火处理均表现出绝缘行为，但在22 GPa下，它们展现出T线性金属输运和超导电性，起始T_c达到66 K，并在接近40 K时实现零电阻。此外，具有更小稀土离子Nd的Nd₃Ni₂O₇也能被稳定化，但在所测量的压力范围内未观测到超导电性。外延稳定化使我们能够研究Ln₃Ni₂O₇（Ln = La, Pr, Nd）中T_c和超导临界压力P_c对Ln离子的依赖性。这些结果表明，更小的Ln离子需要更高的P_c，这与Ln替代块体研究中观察到的趋势一致。本研究证明外延稳定化是进一步扩展超导双层镍酸盐家族的有力技术。</p></details> | 2026-05-20 | Motoki Osada et al. |
| 12 | **[Superconducting PdTe Thin Film Via Topotactic Transformation, Toward Topological Superconductors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.20437v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Topological superconductors (TSCs) hosting Majorana zero modes (MZMs) offer a pathway to fault-tolerant quantum computation. PdTe is a promising TSC candidate due to its topological surface states and a reasonable superconducting critical temperature of ~4.5 K. However, it has been challenging to grow PdTe thin films with bulk-like superconducting properties. Here, we show that high-quality, superconducting PdTe thin films can be grown using molecular beam epitaxy (MBE). The films exhibit a sharp superconducting transition (T_onset = 4.43 K with transition width of 0.06 K), comparable to that of bulk crystals. This was made possible via a topotactic transformation from a PdTe_2 buffer layer to a PdTe phase by growing Pd on top under Te-deficient conditions. Structural and transport analyses confirm the NiAs-type structure of PdTe, as well as its two-dimensional superconducting behavior and excellent air stability. These findings suggest that the MBE-grown PdTe films and their heterostructures are a promising platform for topological superconductivity and Majorana physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>承载马约拉纳零模（MZMs）的拓扑超导体（TSCs）为容错量子计算提供了途径。PdTe因其拓扑表面态和约4.5 K的合理超导临界温度而成为一种有前景的TSC候选材料。然而，生长具有块体类似超导特性的PdTe薄膜一直颇具挑战。在此，我们展示利用分子束外延（MBE）可以生长出高质量、超导的PdTe薄膜。这些薄膜展现出尖锐的超导转变（起始转变温度T_onset = 4.43 K，转变宽度0.06 K），与块体晶体相当。这是通过在Te缺乏条件下在PdTe₂缓冲层上生长Pd，经拓扑化学转变形成PdTe相而实现的。结构和输运分析证实了PdTe的NiAs型结构，以及其二维超导行为和优异的空气稳定性。这些发现表明，MBE生长的PdTe薄膜及其异质结构是研究拓扑超导电性和马约拉纳物理的有前景平台。</p></details> | 2026-05-19 | Hee Taek Yi et al. |
| 13 | **[Spin responses of a disordered helical superconducting edge under Zeeman field](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.04263v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate analytically and numerically the effects of disorder on the helical edge of the 2D topological insulator in the presence of the Zeeman field and superconductivity. Employing bosonization and a renormalization-group analysis, we study how impurity potentials modify charge- and spin-density wave correlations as well as superconducting pair correlations. Our results reveal that the Zeeman field controls the competition: in the attractive regime, it amplifies the superconducting gap, while in the repulsive regime, it stabilizes impurity effects by keeping the system longer in the relevant regime for disorder. We also find that disorder induces logarithmic suppression of transverse density-wave correlations, while at the same time introducing positive logarithmic corrections that enhance superconducting pair correlations and contribute to their stability. These effects directly modify the scaling of spin conductance, providing experimentally accessible signatures of the interplay between disorder and superconductivity in topological edge channels.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们通过解析和数值方法研究了在塞曼场和超导存在下，无序对二维拓扑绝缘体螺旋边缘的影响。利用玻色化方法和重正化群分析，我们探讨了杂质势如何改变电荷密度波、自旋密度波关联以及超导配对关联。结果表明，塞曼场控制着竞争：在吸引区间，它增强超导能隙；而在排斥区间，它通过使系统更长时间维持在无序相关区域来稳定杂质效应。我们还发现，无序会对数地抑制横向密度波关联，同时引入正的对数修正，从而增强超导配对关联并有助于其稳定性。这些效应直接改变了自旋电导的标度行为，为拓扑边缘通道中无序与超导之间的相互作用提供了实验可观测的特征。</p></details> | 2026-05-19 | Zeinab Bakhshipour et al. |
| 14 | **[Unveiling Energetic Advantage in Superconducting Cat-Qubits Quantum Computation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19854v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum computers are emerging as a promising new technology due to their ability to solve complex problems that exceed the capabilities of classical systems in terms of time. Among various implementations, superconducting qubits have become the leading technology due to their scalability and compatibility with quantum error correction mechanisms. Although time has traditionally been the primary focus, energetic efficiency is becoming an increasingly important consideration, especially with the possibility of a quantum energetic advantage. In this article, the energy consumption of the Semiclassical Quantum Fourier Transform was analyzed on a superconducting quantum computing platform based on cat qubits. Quantum error correction mechanisms were studied and considered in the energy estimations. The results show how the energy consumption scales with the number of qubits and how the most relevant parameters required for qubit stabilization, gate implementation, and error correction codes contribute to the overall energy usage. An optimization method was developed to tune these parameters with the goal of minimizing energy consumption while maintaining qubit fidelities above a given threshold. Additionally, a comparative study with state-of-the-art classical computers indicates a potential quantum energetic advantage for systems with more than 26 qubits, assuming cryogenic systems operating at Carnot efficiency, with this energetic advantage arising before any computational advantage. This behavior persists even when realistic cryogenic systems and control electronics are taken into account.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子计算机因其能够解决在时间上超越经典系统能力的复杂问题，正成为一种有前景的新兴技术。在各种实现方案中，超导量子比特因其可扩展性和与量子纠错机制的兼容性而成为领先技术。尽管时间传统上是主要关注点，但能效正成为一个日益重要的考量因素，尤其是在量子能效优势可能实现的情况下。本文基于猫量子比特的超导量子计算平台，分析了半经典量子傅里叶变换的能耗。在能量估算中研究并考虑了量子纠错机制。结果展示了能耗如何随量子比特数量标度，以及量子比特稳定、门实现和纠错码所需的最相关参数如何贡献于总能耗。我们开发了一种优化方法，以在保持量子比特保真度高于给定阈值的同时最小化能耗来调节这些参数。此外，与最先进经典计算机的对比研究表明，假设低温系统以卡诺效率运行，对于超过26个量子比特的系统存在潜在的量子能效优势，且这种能效优势出现在任何计算优势之前。即使考虑实际的低温系统和控制电子设备，这一行为仍然存在。</p></details> | 2026-05-19 | Pedro Ramos et al. |
| 15 | **[SesQ: A Surface Electrostatic Simulator for Precise Energy Participation Ratio Simulation in Superconducting Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.28524v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>An accurate and efficient numerical electromagnetic model for superconducting qubits is essential for characterizing and minimizing design-dependent dielectric losses. The energy participation ratio (EPR) is the commonly adopted metric used to evaluate these losses, but its calculation presents a severe multiscale computational challenge. Conventional finite element method (FEM) requires 3D volumetric meshing, leading to prohibitive computational costs and memory requirements when attempting to capture singular electric fields at nanometer-thin material interfaces. To address this bottleneck, we propose SesQ, a surface integral equation simulator tailored for the precise simulation of the EPR. By applying discretization on 2D surfaces, deriving a semi-analytical multilayer Green's function, and employing a dedicated non-conformal boundary mesh refinement scheme, SesQ accurately resolves singular edge fields without an explosive growth in the number of unknowns. Validations with analytically solvable models demonstrate that SesQ accelerates capacitance extraction by roughly two orders of magnitude compared to commercial FEM tools. While achieving comparable accuracy for capacitance extraction, SesQ delivers superior precision for EPR calculation. Simulations of practical transmon qubits further reveal that FEM approaches tend to significantly underestimate the EPR. Finally, the high efficiency of SesQ enables rapid iteration in the layout optimization, as demonstrated by minimizing the EPR of the qubit pattern, establishing the simulator as a powerful tool for the automated design of low-loss superconducting quantum circuits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>精确且高效的超导量子比特数值电磁模型对于表征和最小化设计相关的介电损耗至关重要。能量参与比（EPR）是评估这些损耗的常用指标，但其计算带来了严峻的多尺度计算挑战。传统的有限元方法（FEM）需要三维体积网格划分，在试图捕捉纳米薄材料界面处的奇异电场时，会导致高昂的计算成本和内存需求。为解决这一瓶颈，我们提出了SesQ，一种专为精确模拟EPR而设计的表面积分方程模拟器。通过在二维表面上进行离散化、推导半解析多层格林函数，并采用专用的非共形边界网格细化方案，SesQ能够在不导致未知量爆炸性增长的情况下精确解析边缘奇异电场。与可解析求解模型的验证表明，与商业FEM工具相比，SesQ将电容提取加速了约两个数量级。在实现与电容提取相当的精度同时，SesQ在EPR计算中提供了更高的精度。对实际transmon量子比特的模拟进一步揭示，FEM方法往往显著低估EPR。最后，SesQ的高效率使得布局优化中的快速迭代成为可能，如通过最小化量子比特图案的EPR所展示的，这确立了该模拟器作为低损耗超导量子电路自动化设计的强大工具。</p></details> | 2026-05-19 | Ziang Wang et al. |
| 16 | **[The Ultrafast Superconducting Diode Effect](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19675v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Nonreciprocal transport is generally observed in superconductors in which time reversal and inversion symmetries are simultaneously broken. This effect, which may become one of the backbones for future superconducting electronics, arises because of asymmetric vortex transport in a magnetic field. However, vortex transport is also intrinsically dissipative and limited in speed. Here, we report on the discovery of ultrafast non-reciprocal transport in centrosymmetric superconductors. For NbN films biased with a quasi-DC supercurrent, picosecond current pulses with the same sign as the bias experience resistive impedance, whereas pulses of opposite polarity encounter an inductive response. Strikingly, the effect is at least three orders of magnitude faster than in conventional superconducting diodes, limited only by ultrafast current-induced depairing. We demonstrate rectification of a 100 GHz signal, with dissipation levels of a few fJ per cycle. We foresee potential for superconducting logic elements, operating at THz bit rates with aJ energy dissipation per operation.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非互易输运通常出现在时间反演和反演对称性同时破缺的超导体中。这一效应可能成为未来超导电子学的支柱之一，其产生源于磁场中非对称的涡旋输运。然而，涡旋输运本质上具有耗散性且速度受限。在此，我们报告了在中心对称超导体中发现的超快非互易输运现象。对于施加准直流超导偏置电流的NbN薄膜，与偏置同号的皮秒电流脉冲经历电阻性阻抗，而相反极性的脉冲则遇到电感响应。引人注目的是，该效应至少比传统超导二极管快三个数量级，其速度仅受限于超快电流诱导的退配对。我们演示了对100 GHz信号的整流，每个周期的耗散水平仅为几个fJ。我们预见其在超导逻辑元件中的应用潜力，能够以THz比特率运行，每次操作的能量耗散为aJ量级。</p></details> | 2026-05-19 | E. Wang et al. |
| 17 | **[Nearly perfect Fermi surface nesting in hole-doped La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ enables bulk superconductivity without pressure or strain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19297v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The discovery of high-temperature superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates has drawn great attention. However, unlike cuprates and iron-based superconductors, Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates exhibit superconductivity either under high pressure in bulk samples or under compressive strain in thin films. Genuine bulk superconductivity under ambient pressure has remained elusive in these materials, precluding key measurements such as specific heat and superfluid density. In this work, we combine density-functional-theory, dynamical-mean-field-theory, and random-phase-approximation to solve the superconducting gap equation for bulk hole-doped bilayer nickelate La$_{3-x}$Sr$_x$Ni$_2$O$_7$ at ambient pressure. We find that hole doping induces a Ni-$d_{3z^2-r^2}$-derived $γ$ pocket on the Fermi surface, and serves as a tuning parameter for both its size and \textit{shape}. As $x$ approaches 0.4, the $γ$ pocket evolves from circular to diamond-shaped and expands to span half of the Brillouin zone, resulting in nearly perfect Fermi surface nesting with the optimal nesting vector $\textbf{Q} = (π, π)$. This, in turn, strongly enhances antiferromagnetic spin fluctuations and substantially increases the leading superconducting eigenvalue to a level at which superconductivity becomes experimentally observable. Our work provides both a robust mechanism and an experimentally feasible route to inducing the long-sought bulk superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ without pressure or strain.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中高温超导的发现引起了广泛关注。然而，与铜氧化物和铁基超导体不同，Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐仅在块材样品的高压条件下或薄膜的压应变条件下才表现出超导电性。在这些材料中，环境压力下的真正块材超导电性一直难以实现，从而阻碍了比热和超流密度等关键测量。在本工作中，我们结合密度泛函理论、动力学平均场理论和随机相位近似，求解了环境压力下空穴掺杂的双层镍酸盐La$_{3-x}$Sr$_x$Ni$_2$O$_7$块材的超导能隙方程。我们发现，空穴掺杂在费米面上诱导出一个源于Ni-$d_{3z^2-r^2}$的$γ$口袋，并作为其大小和\textit{形状}的调节参数。当$x$接近0.4时，$γ$口袋从圆形演变为菱形，并扩展至覆盖半个布里渊区，导致与最优嵌套矢量$\textbf{Q} = (π, π)$近乎完美的费米面嵌套。这反过来强烈增强了反铁磁自旋涨落，并将主导超导本征值显著提升至超导电性在实验上可观测的水平。我们的工作为在La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$中无需压力或应变即可诱导长期寻求的块材超导电性，提供了稳健的机制和实验可行的途径。</p></details> | 2026-05-19 | Chengliang Xia et al. |
| 18 | **[Rotational Quantum Tunneling of a Magnetic Dipole in a Superconducting Trap](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19125v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the quantum dynamics of the rotational degree of freedom of a nano-magnet trapped in a superconducting trap. The nano-magnet is modeled as a magnetic dipole with magnetization pinned to the easy axis of the particle. The magnetic trap then leads to a potential barrier that hinders free rotation of the particle, but through which it can tunnel. We identified rest-gas scattering as the most important decoherence mechanism at low temperatures. A shape of the particle sufficiently close to perfect rotational symmetry about the rotational axis can protect the rotational tunneling against this decoherence mechanism, and we identify experimentally feasible parameter regimes where rotational tunneling should be observable.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了囚禁于超导陷阱中的纳米磁体转动自由度的量子动力学。该纳米磁体被建模为磁偶极子，其磁化方向锁定在颗粒易轴上。磁陷阱产生一个阻碍颗粒自由转动的势垒，但颗粒可通过隧穿效应穿越该势垒。我们确定剩余气体散射是低温下最重要的退相干机制。当颗粒形状在转动轴附近具有足够接近完美旋转对称性时，可保护转动隧穿免受该退相干机制影响，并确定了实验上可行的参数区间，在此区间内转动隧穿应可被观测到。</p></details> | 2026-05-18 | Francis J. Headley et al. |
| 19 | **[Hidden weak-pairing superconductivity of non-interacting anyons obeying $\frac{1}{3}$ statistics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19036v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We show that a non-interacting gas of charge-$e/3$ anyons with exchange statistics $θ=-π/3$ can superconduct through a hidden weak-pairing mechanism. Such an anyon gas arises naturally in doped fractional Chern insulators at filling $1/3$ or $2/3$, where projective lattice translations enforce three degenerate anyon pockets. Exploiting this three-pocket structure, we develop a flux-attachment construction in which the average statistical flux vanishes, thereby mapping the problem to three species of composite fermions (CFs) in zero effective magnetic field. We show that the anyon statistics itself, encoded in statistical gauge field fluctuations, supplies the pairing glue and drives the CFs into a $p-\mathrm{i}p$ paired state, which corresponds to a $f-\mathrm{i}f$ physical superconductor. The CF strong-pairing phase is adiabatically connected to Laughlin's picture of anyon superconductivity, where charge-$e/3$ anyons bind into charge-$2e/3$ molecules, which then lead to superconductivity. By contrast, the more natural weak-pairing phase of CFs realizes a distinct superconducting phase - its edge is characterized by a chiral central charge $c_-=-1/2$, in contrast to the prediction of integer $c_-$ for the anyon superconductor based on Laughlin's picture, thereby resolving the discrepancy between previous theories and recent numerical results. Our theory provides a natural framework for understanding superconductivity near fractional Chern insulators, as observed in recent experiments. Finally, we discuss extensions of our theory that predict new chiral superconductors adjacent to FCIs at other fillings.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们证明，具有交换统计θ=-π/3的电荷-e/3任意子无相互作用气体可通过隐藏的弱配对机制实现超导。这种任意子气体自然出现在掺杂分数陈绝缘体（填充因子1/3或2/3）中，其中投影晶格平移对称性强制形成三个简并的任意子口袋。利用这种三口袋结构，我们发展了一种通量附着构造方法，其中平均统计通量为零，从而将问题映射为三种复合费米子在零有效磁场中的行为。我们证明，编码在统计规范场涨落中的任意子统计本身提供了配对胶水，并驱动复合费米子进入p-ip配对态，对应于f-if物理超导体。复合费米子的强配对相绝热地连接至Laughlin的任意子超导图像，其中电荷-e/3任意子结合成电荷-2e/3分子，进而导致超导。相比之下，更自然的复合费米子弱配对相实现了一种不同的超导相——其边缘由手征中心荷c_-=-1/2表征，而基于Laughlin图像的任意子超导体预测整数c_-，从而解决了先前理论与近期数值结果之间的分歧。我们的理论为理解近期实验中观测到的分数陈绝缘体附近的超导提供了自然框架。最后，我们讨论了理论的扩展，预言了其他填充因子下分数陈绝缘体邻近的新型手征超导体。</p></details> | 2026-05-18 | Zheng-Duo Fan et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Spin Glass Mapping of the Parallel Minority Game](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22764v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The parallel minority game (PMG) extends the classical minority game to many choices, with each agent restricted to two predetermined alternatives. In this condition, minimizing the population variance across all choices is a complex combinatorial optimization problem. We show that this minimization is exactly equivalent to finding the ground state of an Ising spin glass in the mean-field limit, i.e., the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model. By encoding the agent choices as spin variables, the variance becomes a quadratic Hamiltonian with quenched random couplings $J_{ij}$ and random fields $h_i$. This mapping reveals inherent frustration and connects the PMG to the well developed theory of spin glasses, providing a new perspective on the frozen, sub-optimal configurations observed in stochastic strategies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>并行少数者博弈将经典少数者博弈扩展至多选项场景，每位参与者被限制在两个预设选项中进行选择。在此条件下，最小化所有选项的群体方差是一个复杂的组合优化问题。我们证明该最小化问题在平均场极限下等价于伊辛自旋玻璃的基态求解，即谢林顿-柯克帕特里克模型。通过将参与者选择编码为自旋变量，方差转化为具有淬火随机耦合系数$J_{ij}$与随机场$h_i$的二次型哈密顿量。这一映射揭示了系统固有的阻挫特性，并将并行少数者博弈与成熟的自旋玻璃理论体系相联结，为随机策略中观察到的冻结次优构型提供了全新视角。</p></details> | 2026-05-21 | Aryan Tyagi et al. |
| 2 | **[Random Matrix Spectra from Boltzmann-Weighted Lattice Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.21254v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce a random matrix framework for studying statistical-mechanical lattice systems through spectral observables. Equilibrium configurations sampled from a Boltzmann measure are mapped to matrix ensembles whose covariance structure is inherited from the spatial correlations of the underlying model. This construction maps real-space correlation functions to a momentum-space variance profile, providing a direct bridge between statistical-mechanical correlations and correlated random matrix ensembles. We derive this variance profile in finite-correlation-length and critical regimes, and compute spectral moments within a Wick-contraction expansion. A complementary self-consistent description of the bulk density is developed using the resolvent formalism. These analytical methods are benchmarked against Monte Carlo data for the two-dimensional Ising model and three-dimensional Edwards--Anderson spin glasses. In both cases, the spectra evolve from the semicircle law at high temperature to model-dependent critical forms reflecting the structure of correlations. The framework, therefore, provides a quantitative spectral route to probing collective behavior in ordered and disordered statistical systems, while also defining a class of physically motivated correlated random matrix ensembles.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们引入了一个随机矩阵框架，通过谱观测量研究统计力学晶格系统。从玻尔兹曼测度中采样的平衡构型被映射到矩阵系综，其协方差结构继承自底层模型的空间相关性。这种构造将实空间关联函数映射为动量空间方差分布，从而在统计力学关联与相关随机矩阵系综之间建立直接桥梁。我们在有限关联长度和临界区域推导了该方差分布，并通过维克收缩展开计算谱矩。利用预解式形式，我们发展了一种互补的自洽体密度描述。这些分析方法以二维伊辛模型和三维爱德华兹-安德森自旋玻璃的蒙特卡洛数据为基准进行验证。在两种情况下，谱从高温下的半圆律演变为反映关联结构的模型依赖临界形式。因此，该框架为探测有序与无序统计系统中的集体行为提供了定量谱路径，同时定义了一类具有物理动机的相关随机矩阵系综。</p></details> | 2026-05-20 | Yaprak Önder et al. |
| 3 | **[Optimal Persistence Reveals Hidden Topology in Complex Energy Landscapes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19785v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Infinite persistence marks the topological transition. For finite persistence, the canyon-finding rate Gamma(tau_p) on the p=2 spherical spin glass forms an inverted-U profile, peaking at an optimal tau_p^*. At low temperature (T=0.05), tau_p^* drops from 10 to 5 as N increases through 128, marking the discrete-to-quasi-continuous GOE crossover. For N=1024, the peak is flat between tau_p=5 and 6 within statistical uncertainties, preventing a more precise determination. For N>=128, the canyon width saturates at xi_eff=1, consistent with the measured tau_p^*=5 when beta=0.4. At higher temperatures (T>=0.15), tau_p^*=10 and beta(T) scales as 1/T, with temperature dependence entering only through v_th = sqrt(2T). For T=0.10 and N>=128, high-resolution scans give tau_p^*=8.0; for N<=64 at the same temperature, coarse scans place tau_p^* in the range 8-10. Thus, optimal persistence reveals the hidden topology of the landscape-a principle expected to be generic in disordered landscapes with entropic bottlenecks.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>无限持久性标志着拓扑跃迁。对于有限持久性，p=2球面自旋玻璃上的峡谷发现率Gamma(tau_p)呈倒U形曲线，在最优tau_p^*处达到峰值。低温(T=0.05)下，当N增至128时，tau_p^*从10降至5，标志着离散到准连续的GOE交叉。对于N=1024，峰值在统计误差范围内于tau_p=5至6之间平坦，无法进行更精确的测定。当N≥128时，峡谷宽度饱和于xi_eff=1，与beta=0.4时测得的tau_p^*=5一致。在更高温度(T≥0.15)下，tau_p^*=10且beta(T)按1/T标度，温度依赖性仅通过v_th = sqrt(2T)引入。对于T=0.10且N≥128，高分辨率扫描给出tau_p^*=8.0；相同温度下N≤64时，粗扫描将tau_p^*置于8-10范围内。因此，最优持久性揭示了景观的隐藏拓扑——这一原理预期在具有熵瓶颈的无序景观中具有普适性。</p></details> | 2026-05-19 | LI Zhenpeng et al. |
| 4 | **[Frustration from Localized Zhang-Rice States: A Unified Theory of Doping-Driven Magnetic Transitions in Cuprates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.18453v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The microscopic mechanism by which doped holes disrupt the antiferromagnetic order is one of the fundamental questions in cuprates. In this work, we propose a unified microscopic theory in which doped holes form spatially localized Zhang-Rice singlets which actively mediate emergent spin exchange. Rather than acting as simple non-magnetic vacancies, these localized states introduce emergent next-nearest $J_2$ and third-nearest $J_3$ neighbor superexchanges. This dopant-induced exchange pathway generates significant magnetic frustration, naturally explaining the rapid collapse of the Néel AFM order and the emergence of a spin-glass phase on the hole-doped side. Our findings provide a comprehensive framework for understanding the complex doping-driven magnetic phase transitions and magnetic electron-hole asymmetry in lightly doped cuprates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>掺杂空穴破坏反铁磁序的微观机制是铜氧化物中的基本问题之一。本文提出统一的微观理论：掺杂空穴形成空间局域的Zhang-Rice单态，这些单态主动介导涌现的自旋交换。这些局域态并非作为简单非磁空位，而是引入涌现的次近邻J2和第三近邻J3超交换作用。这种掺杂诱导的交换路径产生显著的磁阻挫，自然解释了空穴掺杂侧奈尔反铁磁序的迅速坍塌和自旋玻璃相的出现。我们的发现为理解轻掺杂铜氧化物中复杂的掺杂驱动磁相变和磁电子-空穴不对称性提供了全面框架。</p></details> | 2026-05-18 | Xiaodong Wang et al. |
| 5 | **[At Most Two Infinite Blue Clusters in the CMR Representation of the Edwards-Anderson Spin Glass](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17338v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The two-replica Chayes-Machta-Redner (CMR) representation is one of the main proposed geometric signatures of spin-glass order in the short-range Edwards-Anderson model. Mean-field arguments and recent numerics suggest that the low-temperature phase should exhibit two macroscopic blue clusters carrying opposite overlap signs. We prove a rigorous structural constraint in this direction. For any translation-invariant joint Gibbs measure on disorder, two spin replicas, and CMR bond variables on Z^d, the blue subgraph contains at most two infinite connected components; if two exist, then they lie in a common infinite grey cluster and belong to opposite overlap-parity classes. The main obstacle is that the blue-bond process is neither insertion-tolerant nor positively associated, so the usual Burton-Keane and random-cluster arguments do not apply. We circumvent this by working in the full joint measure and using a finite-box merge operation together with the mass-transport bound on ends of translation-invariant subgraphs. As auxiliary input, we establish finite energy and a percolation transition for the grey subgraph via Bayesian resampling of couplings and a parity-based Peierls estimate. These results do not prove the existence of infinite blue clusters or a spin-glass phase transition, but they give a rigorous upper bound compatible with the two-cluster picture for short-range spin glasses.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>双副本Chayes-Machta-Redner(CMR)表示是短程Edwards-Anderson模型中自旋玻璃序的主要几何特征之一。平均场论证和近期数值结果表明低温相应呈现两个携带相反重叠符号的宏观蓝色团簇。我们证明了该方向上的严格结构约束：对于Z^d上任意平移不变的联合吉布斯测度（包含无序、两个自旋副本及CMR键变量），蓝色子图至多包含两个无限连通分支；若存在两个，则它们位于同一无限灰色团簇中且属于相反重叠奇偶类。主要困难在于蓝键过程既不满足插入容忍性也不具有正关联性，因此常规Burton-Keane和随机团簇论证不适用。我们通过在全联合测度中操作并利用有限盒子合并操作结合平移不变子图端点的质量输运界来规避此问题。作为辅助输入，我们通过耦合的贝叶斯重采样和基于奇偶性的Peierls估计建立了灰色子图的有限能量性质和逾渗转变。这些结果虽未证明无限蓝色团簇或自旋玻璃相变的存在，但为短程自旋玻璃的两团簇图像提供了严格上界。</p></details> | 2026-05-17 | Yan Ru Pei et al. |
| 6 | **[Exact mapping of a spin glass with correlated disorder to the pure Ising model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.22657v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce an Ising spin-glass model with correlated disorder which continuously interpolates between the pure ferromagnetic Ising model and the Edwards-Anderson model with symmetric disorder. For this model, we prove that a Nishimori line (NL) can be defined, analogously to the Edwards-Anderson model, on which physical quantities can be expressed exactly in terms of those of the pure Ising model at a well-defined effective temperature on any lattice in any dimension. For example, the energy on the NL is equal to the energy of the pure Ising model at the effective temperature up to a constant and a trivial factor. More remarkably, the specific heat on the NL equals the energy, not the specific heat, of the pure Ising model at the effective temperature, again up to a constant and a trivial factor. Gauge-noninvariant quantities such as the magnetization and correlation functions are exactly equal to the corresponding quantities of the pure Ising model at the effective temperature. These exact relations imply that the leading critical behavior at that multicritical point for the disorder-correlated model is pure-Ising-like, in contrast to the conventional multicritical universality class of the standard Edwards-Anderson model. Our results motivate further investigations of the relatively unexplored topic of correlations in disorder in spin glasses and related problems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们引入具有关联无序的伊辛自旋玻璃模型，该模型连续插值于纯铁磁伊辛模型和对称无序Edwards-Anderson模型之间。对于该模型，我们证明可定义类似Edwards-Anderson模型的西森线(NL)，在此线上物理量可精确表示为任意维度任意晶格上纯伊辛模型在确定有效温度下的对应量。例如，NL上的能量等于纯伊辛模型在有效温度下的能量（仅差常数和简单因子）。更显著的是，NL上的比热等于纯伊辛模型在有效温度下的能量（而非比热），同样仅差常数和简单因子。磁化强度和关联函数等规范非不变量的精确值等于纯伊辛模型在有效温度下的对应量。这些精确关系意味着该无序关联模型的多临界点主导临界行为呈现纯伊辛类特征，这与标准Edwards-Anderson模型的传统多临界普适类形成对比。我们的结果激励了对自旋玻璃及相关问题中无序关联这一相对未探索课题的进一步研究。</p></details> | 2026-05-15 | Hidetoshi Nishimori et al. |
| 7 | **[Autonomous Emergence of Hamiltonian in Deep Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.20821v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The unprecedented predictive success of deep generative models in complex many-body systems, such as AlphaFold3, raises an epistemological question: do these networks merely memorize data distributions via high-dimensional interpolation, or do they autonomously deduce the underlying physical laws? To address this, we introduce a rigorous algebraic framework to extract the implicit physical interactions learned by generative models. By establishing an exact equivalence between the zero-noise limit of a Riemannian diffusion score field and the thermodynamic restoring force, we utilize the trained neural network as a direct force estimator. Applying this framework to a sequence-dependent, frustrated 1D $O(3)$ spin glass, we probe the latent representations of an $O(3)$-equivariant attention architecture trained solely on thermal equilibrium snapshots. Without incorporating any energetic priors, an overdetermined linear inversion successfully recovers the microscopic Hamiltonian parameters of the spin system. The inferred Hamiltonian parameters exhibit a $99.7\%$ cosine similarity with the ground-truth interaction parameters. Furthermore, these sparse local parameters alone are sufficient to explain $87\%$ of the variance in the continuous force field predicted by the network. Our results provide quantitative, falsifiable evidence that deep generative architectures do not merely perform statistical pattern matching, but autonomously discover and internalize the underlying physical rules.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>深度生成模型在复杂多体系统（如AlphaFold3）中取得了前所未有的预测成功，这引发了一个认识论问题：这些网络是通过高维插值仅记忆数据分布，还是自主推导出了潜在的物理定律？为解决此问题，我们引入了一个严格的代数框架来提取生成模型所学习的隐式物理相互作用。通过建立黎曼扩散得分场零噪声极限与热力学恢复力之间的精确等价关系，我们将训练好的神经网络直接用作力估计器。将该框架应用于一个序列依赖的受挫一维$O(3)$自旋玻璃模型，我们探究了仅基于热平衡快照训练的$O(3)$等变注意力架构的潜在表征。在未引入任何能量先验的情况下，超定线性反演成功恢复了自旋系统的微观哈密顿量参数。推断出的哈密顿量参数与真实相互作用参数的余弦相似度达到$99.7\%$。此外，仅凭这些稀疏的局域参数就能解释网络预测的连续力场中$87\%$的方差。我们的结果提供了可量化的可证伪证据，表明深度生成架构并非仅执行统计模式匹配，而是自主发现并内化了潜在的物理规则。</p></details> | 2026-05-15 | Wenjie Xi et al. |
| 8 | **[Variational Autoregressive Networks with probability priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.16020v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Monte Carlo methods are essential across diverse scientific fields, yet their efficiency is frequently hampered by critical slowing down-a sharp increase in autocorrelation times near phase transitions. Although deep learning approaches, such as neural-network-based samplers, have been proposed to alleviate this issue, they face another serious problem: the difficulty of training the models. This difficulty partially stems from the overly general nature of original machine-learning architectures, which often ignore underlying physical symmetries and force networks to relearn them from scratch. In this paper, we demonstrate that incorporating physical priors into the model significantly enhances performance. Building upon existing strategies that integrate spin-spin interactions, we propose a framework that utilizes a prior probability distribution as a starting point for training. Our results for the Ising model, as well as for the Edwards-Anderson spin glass model, suggest that moving away from `blank slate' models in favor of physics-informed priors reduces the training burden and facilitates the simulation of larger system sizes in discrete spin models.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>蒙特卡洛方法在多个科学领域至关重要，但其效率常因临界慢化（相变附近自相关时间急剧增加）而受限。尽管深度学习方法（如基于神经网络的采样器）被提出以缓解此问题，但它们面临另一严峻挑战：模型训练的困难。这一困难部分源于原始机器学习架构的过度通用性，常忽略潜在物理对称性，迫使网络从零开始重新学习。本文证明，将物理先验融入模型可显著提升性能。基于现有整合自旋-自旋相互作用的策略，我们提出一个以先验概率分布作为训练起点的框架。在伊辛模型及爱德华兹-安德森自旋玻璃模型上的结果表明，从“白板”模型转向物理信息先验可减轻训练负担，并促进离散自旋模型中更大系统尺寸的模拟。</p></details> | 2026-05-15 | Piotr Białas et al. |
| 9 | **[Solving Classical and Quantum Spin Glasses with Deep Boltzmann Quantum States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.15899v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Variational neural network models have achieved remarkable success in solving ground-state problems of quantum many-body systems. However, addressing classical and quantum spin glasses remains challenging, as disorder and energy frustration give rise to an exponentially large number of local energy minima separated by high-energy barriers, hindering the efficiency of conventional Metropolis-based Monte Carlo methods. To bridge this gap, we introduce Deep Boltzmann Quantum States, a class of neural quantum states inspired by deep Boltzmann machines that inherit efficient block Gibbs sampling. We also propose two key advances in the training algorithm. Firstly, we combine natural-gradient updates with state-of-the-art stochastic optimizers. Secondly, we gradually tune the hardness of the problem Hamiltonian by interpolating from an easy to a hard regime, without the need to closely approximate the instantaneous adiabatic state at intermediate times. We match the exact solution or the best available estimate for several instances of classical and quantum Ising spin-glass models with infinite-range interactions and hundreds of spins. We also solve instances of the NP-hard Job Shop Scheduling Problem exceeding the current limitations of quantum annealing hardware. To summarize, deep neural architectures with efficient global update rules and trained within an annealing-like scheme, provide a powerful framework for solving real-world hard combinatorial optimization and for investigating disordered quantum many-body systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>变分神经网络模型在求解量子多体系统基态问题中取得了显著成功。然而，处理经典与量子自旋玻璃仍具挑战性，因为无序和能量受挫导致指数级数量的局域能量极小值被高能垒分隔，阻碍了传统基于梅特罗波利斯算法的蒙特卡洛方法的效率。为弥合这一差距，我们引入深度玻尔兹曼量子态——一类受深度玻尔兹曼机启发的神经量子态，继承了高效的块吉布斯采样。我们还提出了训练算法的两项关键进展：首先，将自然梯度更新与最先进的随机优化器相结合；其次，通过从易到难的哈密顿量插值逐步调节问题难度，无需在中间时刻精确逼近瞬时绝热态。我们匹配了多个具有无限程相互作用和数百个自旋的经典与量子伊辛自旋玻璃模型实例的精确解或最佳可用估计值。我们还解决了超出当前量子退火硬件限制的NP难作业车间调度问题实例。总之，具有高效全局更新规则并在类退火方案中训练的深度神经架构，为解决现实世界中的困难组合优化问题及研究无序量子多体系统提供了强大框架。</p></details> | 2026-05-15 | Luca Leone et al. |
| 10 | **[Chladni states in Ising Spin Lattices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.05961v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Low-temperature spin dynamics can become trapped in long-lived patterns shaped by the geometry of the interaction network. Here we introduce Chladni states: spin configurations obtained by binarizing the eigenmodes of the interaction Laplacian. These graph-spectral patterns organize the metastable configurations reached by Ising systems under non-ergodic relaxation. The resulting Topological Mode Decomposition provides a compact way to monitor and reconstruct frozen spin configurations in ferromagnets, frustrated antiferromagnets, and spin glasses.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>低温自旋动力学可能陷入由相互作用网络几何结构塑造的长寿命模式中。本文引入克拉尼态：通过二值化相互作用拉普拉斯算子的本征模得到的自旋构型。这些图谱谱模式组织了伊辛系统在非遍历弛豫下达到的亚稳态构型。由此产生的拓扑模式分解提供了一种紧凑方法，用于监测和重构铁磁体、受挫反铁磁体及自旋玻璃中的冻结自旋构型。</p></details> | 2026-05-15 | Giulio Iannelli et al. |
